description_long: This is a modern residential house surrounded by a variety of medium-sized trees and shrubs, creating a lush, landscaped environment. The house features a simple, rectangular structure with a flat roof and large, prominent windows on the front and rear facades, allowing for ample natural light. The exterior appears to be finished in a combination of light-colored materials, possibly stucco or concrete, with some wooden or metal accents. The front entryway is defined by a set of steps leading up to a central door, flanked by symmetrical windows. The landscaping is thoughtfully arranged, with trees forming a semi-circular perimeter around the house, enhancing privacy and aesthetic appeal. The overall design is clean and contemporary, with an emphasis on geometric lines and open views.
description: A modern, rectangular house with a flat roof, large windows, and a landscaped perimeter of trees and shrubs. The exterior is light-colored with clean lines and a central entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, large windows, and a symmetrical arrangement of trees forming a semi-circle.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, elongated facade, and dense tree coverage on the right side.
description_view_2: Rear view with large windows and a similar tree arrangement as the front, but with less emphasis on the entryway.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the flat roof, rear windows, and a more open tree arrangement on the left.
attribute_entryway_design: Central door with steps, flanked by large windows, no porch or overhang, minimalistic modern style
